node.text: Calvin's tour is ending soon and he is heading to Boston.

node.text: Calvin described Tokyo as buzzing with energy and the festival crowd as lively.

node.text: Calvin had an amazing experience performing for an eager audience in Tokyo and felt it was a magical moment.

node.text: Calvin recently toured with a well-known artist and had a show in Japan.

node.text: Calvin completed a tour where he performed on a big stage and felt on top of the world.
